nodes.context: Category of organized crime groups with Romanian members, active in EU and Americas.
Mexican drug cartel; Romanian mafia built a pact with them in the Americas.
Italian organized crime group; Romanian mafia collaborates with them for drug trafficking.
Romanian criminal group in Turin, specialized in extortion, robbery and drug trafficking.
Criminal group active in Pantelimon, Sector 2, Bucharest, and Cluj-Napoca, involved in usury and prostitution.
Criminal group with influence in local government, law enforcement, and political parties, involved in blackmail, usury, protection rackets, security services, and real estate.
Criminal group originating from moneylenders, operates in Sectors 1 and 4, involved in real estate and smuggled cigarettes.
Criminal group controlling Sector 3, involved in usury, drug trafficking, and prostitution.
Large criminal group in Sectors 2 and 6, involved in prostitution, usury, and blackmail, not strictly hierarchical.
Criminal group headquartered in Sector 5, involved in usury, prostitution, and blackmail, led by Ion Balint (Nuțu Cămătaru) and Vasile Balint (Sile Cămătaru).
Criminal group led by Ion Voinea, active in Sectors 4 and 5, specializing in drug trafficking and prostitution internationally.
Criminal group headquartered in Sector 6, involved in protection rackets, debt collection, and real estate, with ties to local authorities.

edges.evidence_quote: Romanian Mafia gangs in the Americas are different than those in the EU, where in the Americas the Romanian mafia has built a very lucrative pact with the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.context: Romanian mafia has a lucrative pact with Sinaloa Cartel in the Americas.

edges.evidence_quote: The Romanian mafia controls or collaborates with other transnational groups such as the 'Ndrangheta to distribute narcotics throughout Europe.
edges.context: Romanian mafia collaborates with 'Ndrangheta to distribute narcotics in Europe.

edges.evidence_quote: Also in Turin, Romanian criminals created the 'Brigada Oarza' group, specialized in extortion, robbery and drug trafficking.
edges.context: Brigada Oarza is a group created by Romanian criminals, part of the Romanian mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: To challenge the Cămătari clan, it is alleged that the leaders of the Vancică crime group formed an alliance with the Sportivilor clan and invested in acquiring cars and firearms.
edges.context: The Vancică clan formed an alliance with the Sportivilor clan to challenge the Cămătari clan.
